top3.sql:
SELECT major_name
FROM member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
WHERE member.first_name = 'Phillip' AND member.last_name = 'Cullen';

SELECT m.major_name
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Phillip' AND mem.last_name = 'Cullen';

SELECT major_name
FROM member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
WHERE member.first_name = 'Phillip' AND member.last_name = 'Cullen';

SELECT m.major_name
FROM member AS mem
INNER JOIN major AS m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Phillip' AND mem.last_name = 'Cullen';

SELECT m.major_name
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Phillip' AND mem.last_name = 'Cullen';

SELECT major_name
FROM member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
WHERE member.first_name = 'Phillip' AND member.last_name = 'Cullen';

SELECT m.major_name
FROM member AS mem
INNER JOIN major AS m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Phillip' AND mem.last_name = 'Cullen';

SELECT m.major_name
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Phillip' AND mem.last_name = 'Cullen';

final.sql:
SELECT major_name
FROM member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
WHERE member.first_name = 'Phillip' AND member.last_name = 'Cullen';
